settings.question: How do I order online?
settings.answer: Browse our products, add to cart and checkout securely via Peach Payments. For large orders or fitment queries, WhatsApp us on 063 500 1740.

settings.question: Can I collect in store?
settings.answer: Yes — click & collect is free from 140 Modderfontein Road, Tembisa. Select "Pickup" at checkout.

settings.question: Do you offer same-day fitment?
settings.answer: Yes. WhatsApp us on 063 500 1740 to confirm availability and book your fitment slot.

settings.question: What is your battery warranty?
settings.answer: Osaka batteries carry a 6-month pro-rata warranty. Exide Eco batteries carry a 12-month pro-rata warranty. If your battery fails within the warranty period, bring it in — we calculate a fair refund based on months of actual use.

settings.question: How does the trade-in credit work?
settings.answer: When you buy a battery and bring your old one at collection, we credit you R250 (Osaka) or R475 (Exide) at the counter.

settings.question: Do you ship nationwide?
settings.answer:
Yes — we deliver nationwide across South Africa.
Batteries: R100 flat fee anywhere in SA.
Tyres: R100 per tyre nationwide.
Combos: R600 flat fee via Pudo nationwide.
Accessories & Oils: R100 flat fee on all orders.
Free click & collect available at our Tembisa store.
WhatsApp us on 063 500 1740 for delivery queries.

settings.question: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.answer: All major credit and debit cards via Peach Payments, EFT via Pay by Bank, Payflex buy-now-pay-later, and Scan to Pay. Cash on collection also accepted.
